basic_details.job_title: District Court Jharsuguda Group D Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Court Jharsuguda Group D Notification 2026 has been released on 19-05-2026 on the official website of District Court Jharsuguda. Have been announced through the District Court Jharsuguda Group D Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 32 years

qualification.education_qualification: Must have passed at least M.E. standard (Class-VII) examination from a recognised institution.
qualification.details: Must have passed at least M.E. standard (Class-VII) examination from a recognised institution. Must be able to speak, read and write in Odia. Have elementary knowledge in English. Must be a citizen of India. Shall be of good character. Be of sound health and free from organic defect or bodily infirmity.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Jharsuguda Group D Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Court Jharsuguda Group D Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Court Jharsuguda Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Court Jharsuguda Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) posts is 19th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed at least the M.E. standard (Class-VII) examination from a recognised institution to be eligible for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) posts is between 18 years and 32 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) post will receive a salary of Rs. 462 per day.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the District Court Jharsuguda Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the District Court Jharsuguda Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the District Court Jharsuguda Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential skills required for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) role?
faq.answer: Apart from the educational qualification, candidates must be able to speak, read, and write in Odia and possess elementary knowledge of English. Good character and sound health are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) posts primarily involves Application Submission followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant sections on the official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: The official notification states that there are 0 vacancies for the Group-D Employee (Daily Wages) post. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any further clarification.
